title: KeyCorp (KEY) Hurt by Rising Expenses, Weak Credit Quality
text: An increase in operating expenses and deteriorating credit quality are major headwinds for KeyCorp (KEY).

title: The 7 Highest-Yielding S&P 500 Stocks Could Be Huge ‘Strong Buy' Winners for the Second Half of 2023
text: Investors love dividend stocks. They not only provide dependable income, but they also give investors a great opportunity for solid total return.

title: KeyBank Secured Credit Card Improves Financial Journeys for More Than 20,000 Program Graduates
text: Spring 2023 graduating class surpasses a significant milestone in the number of clients who have improved credit scores and financial standing through the program since 2019 CLEVELAND , June 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, KeyBank (NYSE: KEY) announced that the Spring 2023 graduating class of the Secured Credit Card program comprises nearly 5,000 clients who have been empowered to improve their credit scores and establish financial stability. This latest announcement brings the total number of graduates to more than 20,000 since the program's first graduation in 2019.

title: KeyCorp (KEY) Flat As Market Sinks: What You Should Know
text: In the latest trading session, KeyCorp (KEY) closed at $9.35, marking no change from the previous day.

title: SHAREHOLDER ACTION NOTICE: The Schall Law Firm Announces it is Investigating Claims Against KeyCorp and Encourages Investors with Losses to Contact the Firm
text: LOS ANGELES, CA / ACCESSWIRE / June 26, 2023 / The Schall Law Firm, a national shareholder rights litigation firm, announces that it is investigating claims on behalf of investors of KeyCorp ("KeyCorp" or "the Company") (NYSE:KEY) for violations of the securities laws. The investigation focuses on whether the Company issued false and/or misleading statements and/or failed to disclose information pertinent to investors.

title: Should You Buy the 5 Highest-Paying Dividend Stocks in the S&P 500?
text: Three oil stocks, a tobacco stock, and a bank stock make the list. Wall Street is generally bullish on all five of these high-yielding stocks.

title: 4 Top Dividend Payers of the S&P 500
text: High yields are not always a good thing, with some indicating a high risk of a dividend cut. Some companies have proven they can support a high yield thanks to their solid business fundamentals.

title: KEYCORP ANNOUNCES 2024 QUARTERLY EARNINGS CONFERENCE CALL DATES
text: CLEVELAND , June 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) today announced plans to host conference calls to review quarterly financial results on the following dates: Fourth quarter 2023 – Thursday, January 18 th, 2024 at 9:00am ET First quarter 2024 – Thursday, April 18 th, 2024 at 9:00am ET Second quarter 2024 – Thursday, July 18 th, 2024 at 9:00am ET Third quarter 2024 – Thursday, October 17 th, 2024 at 9:00am ET The financial results are scheduled to be released before the market opens on the dates noted above, and the live audio webcast of the conference call and presentation materials will be available at www.key.com/ir. Dial-in information will be provided at a later date.

title: INVESTIGATION ACTION ALERT: The Schall Law Firm Announces it is Investigating Claims Against KeyCorp and Encourages Investors with Losses to Contact the Firm
text: LOS ANGELES, CA / ACCESSIWRE / June 22, 2023 / The Schall Law Firm, a national shareholder rights litigation firm, announces that it is investigating claims on behalf of investors of KeyCorp ("KeyCorp" or "the Company") (NYSE:KEY) for violations of the securities laws. The investigation focuses on whether the Company issued false and/or misleading statements and/or failed to disclose information pertinent to investors.

title: U.S. Regional Banks' Top Line to be Under Pressure in Q2
text: Several regional banks, including KeyCorp (KEY), Comerica (CMA), Fifth Third (FITB), Zions (ZION) and Citizens Financial (CFG), lower Q2 top-line expectations on higher rates, rising deposit costs and weak loan demand.

title: KeyCorp's 8.2% Yield Is A Bargain
text: KeyCorp's deposit business remains strong despite the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank and regional bank currently pays a leading 8.2% dividend yield. The bank's valuation is currently depressed, providing a potential investment opportunity as it recovers from the financial crisis. KeyCorp's high dividend yield and strong deposit base make it an attractive option for income-oriented investors.

title: Regional Banks Have Begun to Adjust Their Second-Quarter Guidance
text: Higher funding costs are putting pressure on net interest income and margins. Several management teams seem to have underestimated just how tough conditions might become.

title: Hawkish Fed Pauses Rate Hikes: What This Means for Banks
text: The Fed pauses rate hikes but signals more for later this year. Banks, including PacWest (PACW), Comerica (CMA), Zions (ZION), Fifth Third (FITB) and KeyCorp (KEY), get a much-needed breather.

title: KeyBank's continued investment in online banking experience wins with clients
text: CLEVELAND , June 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, KeyBank (NYSE:KEY) announced its recognition as #1 in Customer Satisfaction for Regional Bank Online Experiences in the J.D. Power 2023 U.S. Online Banking Satisfaction Study*.

title: KeyCorp (KEY) Slips 4.3% on Disappointing Q2 NII Guidance
text: KeyCorp (KEY) expects NII in the second quarter to decrease 12% sequentially. This dismal guidance turned investors bearish on the stock.

title: Why Shares of KeyCorp, Comerica, and Truist Are Falling Today
text: KeyCorp attributed the lower net interest income guidance to higher deposit costs. Banks may end up feeling more of the effects of the banking crisis in their second-quarter results.

title: Markets Gain Amid Anticipation of a Fed Rate Hike Pause
text: U.S. equities were up at midday on Monday, June 12, 2023 amid optimism the Fed will pause its rate hike cycle.

title: Sell the Rally and Rate Hike Pause: 7 ‘Strong Buy' Analyst Favorites Pay Huge Dividends
text: Wall Street is giddy again and ready to party like it is 1999 after the S&P 500 burst out of the longest bear market in over 70 years last week.

title: Should You Keep KeyCorp (KEY) on Your Radar for Solid Dividend?
text: Investors should keep an eye on fundamentally robust dividend-yielding stocks like KeyCorp (KEY) amid the challenging macroeconomic environment.

title: Regional Bank Stocks Rebound on Expected Pause in Rate Hikes
text: U.S. regional banks, including BAC, C, WFC, KEY and CMA, rally on optimistic investor sentiments as market participants expect no further increase in interest rate hikes.

title: Why KeyCorp Stock Dropped 17.1% in May
text: News about the broader banking industry soured investor sentiment last month. KeyCorp is trading below its book value.

title: Why Shares of American Express, PacWest Bancorp, and KeyCorp Are Rising Today
text: The U.S. economy added an impressive 339,000 jobs in May, yet unemployment moved higher to 3.7%. Congress also passed the debt ceiling agreement last night.

title: KEYCORP TO PRESENT AT THE MORGAN STANLEY US FINANCIALS, PAYMENTS, & CRE CONFERENCE
text: CLEVELAND , June 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) announced today that Chris Gorman, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, and Clark Khayat, Chief Financial Officer, will present at the Morgan Stanley US Financials, Payments, & CRE Conference on Monday, June 12, 2023, at 10:15 a.m. ET in New York City.
